council_members.description: Focus on practical, actionable recommendations. Prefer immediate value over theoretical purity.
Challenge assumptions. Identify edge cases, risks, and failure modes.
Integrate multiple perspectives into a coherent, balanced answer.

local_demo.description: Deterministic placeholder responses. No model required. Proves 3-stage flow without API keys.

ollama_local.description: Local Ollama inference. Only fires when --apply is passed and ollama is installed. Falls back to local_demo if unavailable.

openrouter_external_disabled.description: External OpenRouter/API calls. DISABLED by default. Requires external_enabled=true in config AND env var set. TODO: implement when explicitly authorized.

customization_notes.add_members: Add entries to council_members. Each needs id, role, model.
customization_notes.change_chairman: Update chairman_member to the id of a council_members entry.
customization_notes.change_ranking_criteria: Update ranking_criteria list. Used in Stage 2 anonymous peer review.
customization_notes.synthesis_policy: Chairman synthesizes the top-ranked response with minority opinions preserved.
customization_notes.disagreement_handling: Minority opinions are surfaced in Stage 2 ranking before synthesis.
customization_notes.cost_controls: No cost in local_demo or ollama_local mode. External mode is disabled by default.
customization_notes.provider_routing: Set default_provider_mode to switch between local_demo, ollama_local, or openrouter_external_disabled.
